title: LIMITED EMERGENCY MOTEL VOUCHERS - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL THE DALLES LIMITED EMERGENCY MOTEL VOUCHERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide emergency motel vouchers to stranded individuals. 315 W 3rd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Homeless families and individuals without other means of shelter Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-5pm, Friday 10am-3pm Email (541) 296-9566 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-9566 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or walk in for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: City of The Dalles SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 10am-5pm, Friday 10am-3pm Services: Homeless Motel Vouchers Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWERS AND LAUNDRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
